game.name: Boyz Weekend 2026
game.start_location: Zephyr Hotel, 250 Beach St, San Francisco, CA 94133
game.end_location: Buena Vista Bar, 2765 Hyde St, San Francisco, CA 94109

clues.title: Giants Proof
clues.instructions: Find something within walking distance that clearly shows the San Francisco Giants (logo, signage, apparel, or a Giants-related display). Take a photo that includes: (1) the Giants reference, (2) your full team in the frame, (3) a visible landmark so we know you're in SF.
clues.ai_rubric: PASS if Giants reference is unambiguous AND all 4 team members are visible AND context indicates San Francisco. Score higher for creativity and clear composition.

clues.title: 49ers Proof
clues.instructions: Record a 10–20 second video of your team doing a 49ers-themed moment (chant, pose, or 'touchdown' celebration). In the video: (1) say the phrase 'Boyz Weekend 2026', (2) show all 4 team members, (3) include something that ties it to SF (street sign, landmark, etc.).
clues.ai_rubric: PASS if video is 10–20 seconds AND includes the spoken phrase 'Boyz Weekend 2026' AND all 4 members are visible AND 49ers theme is clear. Score higher for humor and creativity.

clues.title: Waymo to Lombard
clues.instructions: Take a Waymo ride to 1083 Lombard Street, San Francisco, CA. Scan the QR code at the Lombard Street checkpoint to confirm your arrival.
clues.ai_rubric: PASS if photo clearly shows the team at or near 1083 Lombard Street (the crooked street). All team members must be visible.

clues.title: [CLUE 9 - TBD]
clues.instructions: [LOCATION_TBD] — Approaching Fisherman's Wharf / Hyde St area.

clues.title: All Aboard the Cable Car
clues.instructions: Board a cable car and ride to the Buena Vista Bar stop at Hyde & Beach. Scan the QR code at the cable car boarding point to confirm. Enjoy the ride — you're almost there!
clues.ai_rubric: PASS if photo shows team on or boarding a cable car. All members visible. Bonus points for a great group shot.

clues.title: [CLUE 11 - Buena Vista #1]
clues.instructions: [LOCATION_TBD] — Issued at Buena Vista Bar. Unlocks upon cable car arrival.

clues.title: [CLUE 12 - Buena Vista Final]
clues.instructions: [LOCATION_TBD] — Final clue, issued at Buena Vista Bar.

sabotage_catalog.name: Map Scramble
sabotage_catalog.description: Scramble the target team's clue map for 3 minutes (display a fake hint overlay).

sabotage_catalog.name: Time Bomb
sabotage_catalog.description: Force the target team to wait 60 seconds before they can submit their next clue.

sabotage_catalog.name: Double or Nothing
sabotage_catalog.description: Bet 30 points on your own next clue — PASS verdict doubles the payout; FAIL costs you 30 extra.

sabotage_catalog.name: Clue Peek
sabotage_catalog.description: Reveal the title (but not text) of your team's next clue immediately.

sabotage_catalog.name: Saboteur's Taunt
sabotage_catalog.description: Send an anonymous trash-talk message to a target team's event feed.
